text: Next.js 16 with Tailwind v4 CSS-first @theme directive cleanly separates design tokens from component code, avoiding config bloat
Press Start 2P pixel font via @import from Google Fonts is the standard choice for retro gaming portals; avoids custom font files
localStorage-only leaderboards eliminate infrastructure cost for friends-league games; inlining static data removes source-repo coupling
Stripping auth/API dependencies at intake (OAuth, NextAuth, anti-cheat tokens) enables clean game migration across repos
Canvas games preserve game loop logic cleanly; only strip auth/API calls and external state dependencies
